---
title: "Calculate Indicators (v3 - Raster Stack)"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())
gc()

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Load Data

## Load Indicator Stack

```{r}
cat("Loading indicator stack...\n")

stack_path <- file.path(ind.dir, "indicators_stack.tif")
indicators <- rast(stack_path)

cat("Indicator stack loaded:\n")
cat("  Layers:", nlyr(indicators), "\n")
cat("  Layer names:", paste(names(indicators), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("  CRS:", crs(indicators), "\n")
cat("  Extent:", ext(indicators), "\n\n")

```

# Calculate Pixel Counts

For each indicator layer, sum the pixel values. Since all layers are binary (0 or 1), the sum equals the pixel count.

```{r}
# Setup logging
log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_studyarea_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
}

log_msg("Starting indicator calculation (v3 - raster stack)")
log_msg(paste("Total indicators:", nlyr(indicators)))

```

```{r}
# Calculate pixel count for each layer
cat("Calculating pixel counts...\n")

results <- data.frame(
  indicator_id = names(indicators),
  pixel_ones = NA_real_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in seq_len(nlyr(indicators))) {
  
  id <- names(indicators)[[i]]
  
  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: started", id))
  
  tryCatch({
    
    # Extract layer and sum pixel values
    layer <- indicators[[i]]
    pix_count <- sum(values(layer), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    results$pixel_ones[i] <- pix_count
    
    log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: pixel count = %f", id, pix_count))
    log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: finished", id))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: ERROR - %s", id, e$message))
  })
  
  # Progress update every 5 indicators
  if (i %% 5 == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("  Processed %d of %d indicators\n", i, nlyr(indicators)))
  }
}

log_msg("Indicator calculation completed")

cat("Pixel count calculation complete.\n\n")

```

# Output Results

```{r}
# Display results
cat("Results:\n")
print(results)
cat("\n")

# Summary statistics
cat("Summary:\n")
cat("  Total indicators:", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("  Mean pixel count:", mean(results$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Min pixel count:", min(results$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Max pixel count:", max(results$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

```

# Save to S3

```{r}
# Write local temp CSV
tmp_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  results,
  tmp_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Upload to S3
cat("Uploading results to S3...\n")

aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = tmp_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts_v3.csv"
)

log_msg("Saved indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts_v3.csv to S3")

cat("Results saved to S3:\n")
cat("  s3://sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts_v3.csv\n\n")

```

# Cleanup

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
gc()

cat("Script 2.0 v3 complete.\n")
```
